ocr.text: Group  Cytokine production (pg/mL)
IFN-γ  IL-12(p70)  IL-10  IL-4
Covariate  N Studies  Coefficient (95% CI)  p value
Study age criteria (under 22 or over 18)  6  0.067 (−0.365, 0.499)  0.691
Type I or type II diabetes  5  −0.05 (−0.74, 0.63)  0.825
Duration smoked  Not reported  N/A  N/A
The first table presents cytokine production in pg/mL across four groups: for the group pVAX-TgCDPK2, the values are IFN-γ
is 104.63 ± 28.39, IL-12(p70) is < 15, IL-10 is < 15, and IL-4 is 11.29 ± 4.45; for the PBS group, IFN-γ is 89.14 ± 20.14, IL-
12(p70) is < 15, IL-10 is < 15, and IL-4 is 13.17 ± 0.98; and for the Blank control, IFN-γ is 62.14 ± 26.92, IL-12(p70) is < 15,
IL-10 is < 15, and IL-4 is 11.67 ± 3.21. The second table details various covariates affecting study outcomes, with the mean
study age showing N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.003 (−0.009, 0.014), and a p value of 0.052; study age criteria
(under 22 or over 18) also has N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.067 (−0.365, 0.499), and a p value of 0.691; type I or
type II diabetes shows N Studies of 5, a Coefficient (95% CI) of −0.05 (−0.74, 0.63), and a p value of 0.825; male (percent) has
N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.002 (−0.006, 0.010), and a p value of 0.522; study design indicates N Studies of 6, a
Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.062 (−0.483, 0.608), and a p value of 0.767; while duration smoked is not reported, marked as N/A
for both Coefficient and p value.
